ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Continued To Apr-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Earl Jiang, Esq., counsel for and with I Ping Ho, suspended Administrator (appearing separately by video conference).

At the Court's invitation, Mr. Jiang acknowledges the irregularities presented by the current petition and that some, if not most, of the delay has been occasioned by his inactivity. He notes that his efforts to file a substitution of attorney has been thwarted on several occasions with the Court noting that the same has been occasioned by the want of a signature on the proof of service for the same.

The Court next questions Mr. Jiang as to his ostensible representation of both the petitioner and the suspended administrator. Mr. Jiang advises that the family is entirely aware of the same and has authorized his representation.

After further discussion, the Court reinstates I Ping Ho as the Administrator of the Estate of Yung Ming Liu. The Court further instructs Mr. Jiang to effect the filing of the substitution of attorney and file a Petition for Final Distribution with Mr. Ho as the Petitioner, not Chia Hao Liu.

The Court continues the matter to April 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Continued To Dec-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Earl L. Jiang, Esq., counsel for Chia Hao Liu, personal representative (appearing by telephone).

No appearance is made at the first call. At the second call, Mr. Jiang reports on the status of administration advising that the Administrator has been detained in Taiwan due to the pandemic.

The Court continues this matter to December 9, 2020. No appearance will be necessary on that date if the required pleadings are filed one week prior to the hearing date. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.
Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Helen Yune Trowbridge; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2020 Continued To Sep-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance is made by any counsel, party or other interested person.

The case is called at 9:23 a.m. and noting no appearances, the Court passes the matter.

Upon subsequent calendar call, no appearance is made. An Order to Appear shall issue to Chia Hao Liu, Petitioner, and Earl Jiang, Esq., counsel for Chia Hao Liu, Petitioner, to appear on September 2, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they, and each of them, failed to appear and to show cause as to why a contempt proceeding should not commence. the hearing on the Petition on First Account and Report of the Administrator is continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody; Examiner: Sandra Hilton; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Continued To Dec-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court suspends I Ping Ho as the Administrator of the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to December 2, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Show Cause as to why the Administrator should not be removed if the inventory and appraisal, and a petition to close the estate are not filed by November 25, 2019 is also set for December 2, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Continued To Oct-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Earl Jiang for Petitioner.

Mr. Jiang stated that he re-submitted the inventory and appraisal, that he did not have any discussion with Ms. Yawitz (Probate Referee) about the out of County properties and that he had the appraisals done by an out of County Appraiser. The Court informed Mr. Jiang that he needs to file the inventory and appraisal, and either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to October 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Siu. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on August 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he/she failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
